response.overview: Pink Kitty Video is back and bringing some serious heat with another installment of P.O.Verted! And there's little doubt that this is one of the premier and hottest P.O.V. series out there today. And this sixth installment just might be one of the best of the entire series! With starlets like Alexis Silver, Amy Reid, Brandy Taylor, Carmella Bing, Dee, Gianna and Sara Stone, you know you're going to see some of the top starlets! And with the POV action, it will make it seem like you are right there and in on the action!
response.title: P. O. Verted 6
